blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Aye. You texting somebody in class?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bruh you are literally looking at your phone right now.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: You didn't have to. You got that face.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: The face where you're trying to look normal and failing completely. It's a whole thing.
I put the phone in my pocket. Jonathan was already grinning. He was going to be insufferable about this.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: She texted you first didn't she.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: I am keeping my voice down. This is my quiet voice. You're welcome.
